name: Peer Support Group for Job Seekers
description: A mutually supportive space for job seekers to share experiences, encouragement, and practical strategies. This group helps members build resilience, confidence, and hope through shared journey.
short_name: Peer Support Group for Job Seekers

name: Bipoc Meetup
description: Join the BIPOC Climbing Collective for a night of bouldering, ropes, and fun at Gowanus. This event is for Black, Indigenous, People of Color to climb and build community.

name: The Phoenix
description: The Phoenix hosts sober climbing events for members and guests on the second Saturday of every month. The only requirement to attend is 48 hours of continuous sobriety. Friends and family are welcome.

name: Crux Queer Femme
description: Crux Queer Femme is a climbing event designed for individuals who identify as femme or have felt femme and want to climb. This event offers a welcoming space for all.

name: Tastes of Chinatown: Neighborhood History and Food Tour
description: Enjoy delicious cuisine while learning the compelling stories of Chinatown’s history on this sensory tour featuring four savory dishes and one dessert.

name: Distillery Tour
description: Explore the production process of NYC's oldest whiskey distillery, from milling and mashing to fermentation and distilling. The tour includes a visit to the barrel room for a guided tasting of core spirits.

name: Whiskey Tasting Class
description: Learn how to nose, taste, and evaluate whiskey like a pro during this expert-led session covering production and barrel aging. The class includes a flight of five premium hand-crafted whiskeys.

name: Play at BCM
description: Come explore some of BCM's most-loved exhibits, including toddler-favorite Totally Tots and the miniature shops of World Brooklyn.

name: Pen Pals
description: This play tells the story of two women who have been best friends for fifty years through letters, featuring Melissa Gilbert and Veanne Cox. Five percent of ticket sales are donated to Susan G. Komen for breast cancer research.

name: DIY Tapestry Weaving for Beginners
description: Learn how to dress a loom and create small tapestry-style weavings that can be used as coasters or wall hangings. Each student receives a simple homemade loom to keep.

name: Contemporary Dance with Andrea Murillo
description: This adult technique class uses somatic approaches, focusing on breath, alignment, and phrase work to build expression.

name: Tarot 101: Learn How to Do Tarot Readings
description: Discover the meanings of all 78 cards in the deck and practice intuitive shuffling techniques to perform your own readings. This class includes a classic Rider-Waite Tarot deck and a bundle of sage.
short_name: Learn How to Do Tarot Readings

name: Writers Group
description: A collaborative space for writers to share their current projects and receive constructive feedback from peers. This group supports various genres and levels of experience.

name: Issues and Action Discussion Circle
description: A weekly gathering to discuss social justice issues and current events from an ethical perspective. Participants explore ways to take meaningful action in their communities.

name: RAAAATSCRAPS: The Best Improv Show in the World
description: NYC’s best improvisers from shows like Succession and Severance join a surprise guest monologist for a night of world-class improv.
short_name: The Best Improv Show in the World

name: Free Form Movement with Sofia Quezaire
description: An all-levels movement class featuring meditation, full-body activation, and improvised movement to foster body-community connection.

name: Nuyorican Bowery Slam
description: An open-mic-style poetry competition where members of the public compete for a spot in the Monthly Grand Slam.

name: Rev. Vince Anderson & The Love Choir!
description: Experience a night of "dirty gospel" with Rev. Vince Anderson and his Love Choir. This long-running Monday night residency is a staple of Brooklyn's live music scene.
short_name: Rev. Vince Anderson & The Love Choir!

name: Morning Food Scrap Drop-off
description: Bring fruit, vegetable, and coffee ground scraps to be turned into nutrient-rich compost used throughout the park. Meat, fish, citrus, and compostable cutlery are not accepted.

name: Winter Workshops with A Rosie Day
description: Join A Rosie Day for cozy crafting, skating, and seasonal magic. This free workshop is open to all ages, even for those who do not wish to skate.

name: The Open Mic Downstairs @ Frigid New York
description: A supportive weekly open mic where performers get seven minutes to try anything from performance art and comedy to music and dance. The event focuses on building an attentive and welcoming community.

name: 222 Tuesdays
description: Visit the historical loft at 222 Bowery to browse artist-curated books, listen to records, and explore the famous Burroughs bedroom. This weekly open house is a space for music and conversation.

name: Contact Improvisation Jam
description: A movement jam featuring contact improvisation with live music, beginning with a brief introduction for newcomers.

name: Food Rescue Pickup (Simple Loaf - Park Slope)
description: Transport surplus food from Simple Loaf in Park Slope to the CHiPS community pantry. Volunteers help ensure that high-quality food reaches those in need rather than going to waste.

name: Intro to DaVinci Resolve
description: Walk through the steps of setting up a project, importing media, and basic video editing.

name: Video Editing with Premiere
description: Navigate the Adobe Premiere interface to import footage and edit a short video segment with transitions and effects.

name: Soul Records Laboratory
description: Join Soul in the Horn for "Soul Records Laboratory," a weekly music series featuring up-and-coming DJs. Dance to electrifying jams with views of the NYC skyline while enjoying cocktails and food.

name: Antigone (This Play I Read in High School)
description: A riveting take on the classic reimagining Oedipus’ daughter through a modern lens focused on autonomy and lost leaders.

name: Open Play Mahjong
description: Join other players for a relaxed afternoon of open play mahjong in a welcoming communal space. This session is designed for those who already know the basics of the game.

name: Tuff Enuf Trivia with Owen Scott
description: Test your knowledge with Tuff Enuf Trivia hosted by Owen Scott.

name: Food Rescue Pickup (Brooklyn Bread - Carroll Gardens Location)
description: Help transport donated items from Brooklyn Bread's Carroll Gardens store to the CHiPS soup kitchen. Volunteers play a vital role in recovering surplus food for distribution to the local community.

name: Evening Food Scrap Drop-off
description: Bring fruit, vegetable, and coffee ground scraps to be turned into nutrient-rich compost used throughout the park. Meat, fish, citrus, and compostable cutlery are not accepted.

name: Game Center Playtest Thursdays
description: Bring your work-in-progress games, including digital projects, board games, or VR, to get feedback from fellow game makers. Open to all designers, players, and game enthusiasts.

name: Book a School Tour

name: Lower East Stories, hosted by Matt Storrs

short_name: Lower East Stories, hosted by Matt Storrs

name: Food Rescue Pickup (Roca De Seguridad Church / Paris Baguette)
description: Volunteers collect donated food from Paris Baguette at the Roca De Seguridad Church and deliver it to CHiPS. This effort helps reduce food waste and supports the local community meals program.

name: Food Rescue Pickup (Colson Patisserie - 9th St. Park Slope)

name: Evento x Bucketlisters Cooking Party!

name: Young Adult Friction: an indie + alt dance party

name: Wake Up & Dance with Suzi Shelton

name: Noise Complaint with DJ LSJ

name: Tom D's Big New York Show

name: Femmes Book Club
description: A book club for femme-presenting readers discussing "BITTER SWEET" by Hattie Williams and other contemporary fiction featuring badass characters.

name: Brooklyn Navy Yard: World War II Tour

name: The Fat Cats Youth Orchestra Open Workshop and Rehearsals
description: Weekly open workshops and rehearsals for the Fat Cats Youth Orchestra, focusing on mentorship and musical excellence.
short_name: The Fat Cats Youth Orchestra Open Workshop and Rehearsals

name: Free One Hour Outdoor Yoga in La Plaza

name: Food Rescue Pickup (Brooklyn French Bakers - Park Slope Location)

name: Murder, They Read Book Club
description: Join fellow readers to dissect murder mysteries and thrillers, currently discussing "THE ONCE AND FUTURE ME" by Melissa Pace.

name: First Mondays: Readings of New Works In Progress

description: A high-energy live music showcase from party starters designed to help you plan your next event.

name: Winter Virtual Poetry Intensive: Amateur Poetics

description: A six-week poetry workshop exploring the concept of 'amateur' poetics, focusing on writing for pleasure and interest rather than profit.

name: The Moth Storyslam

name: Interviewing for Film & TV

name: Pre-Production Essentials

name: Open Hours at the Environmental Education Center
description: Explore the park's ecology through a 250-gallon aquarium, a scale model of the park, and hands-on crafts. Educators are available to help reveal the hidden stories of the Brooklyn waterfront.

name: Community Access Thursdays
description: Explore the Museum's most-loved exhibits during these community access hours held every Thursday afternoon.

name: New Book Book Club with Sarah

name: Themed Thursdays hosted by Milk
description: Join drag performer and figure skater Milk for a themed night on the ice with curated weekly themes. The best on-theme costume wins a pair of SKATE admissions, and Milk performs at 7:30 pm.

description: Convert still images and sound clips into a compelling digital video story using simple techniques.

name: Studio Podcasting
description: Learn the fundamentals of producing a podcast in a professional studio, covering microphone setup and console settings.

name: Prospect Park Board Gaming Club
description: An evening dedicated to tabletop gaming and social strategy. Players of all skill levels are welcome to join for a night of board games and community fun.

name: 2024 Baby Meetup at Wild East
description: A casual weekly Friday meetup for parents, families, and babies at Wild East Brewing.

name: Street Food City
description: This exhibition celebrates generations of immigrant street food entrepreneurs in New York City and the diverse dishes they introduced to the culinary landscape.

name: Punk Show @ P.I.T
description: A punk music showcase hosted by ABC No Rio in exile. Line-up and flyer details are to be announced.

name: Live Music Performance
description: An evening of live music featuring talented artists at the Bowery Ballroom.

name: Coffee with Comrades
description: Informal social meetups held across different NYC neighborhoods. Meet fellow socialists, discuss local issues, and build community in a relaxed setting.

name: Accelerated TV Studio

description: A comedy showcase featuring a curated lineup of rising stand-up talent.

name: The Photobooth Technicians Project
description: An exhibit featuring a unique accordion-fold book that explores photobooth history through interviews with 49 global technicians. The project highlights the manual labor and culture that keeps vintage booths running.

name: Alternatives to Adobe
description: Introduction to free and low-cost software alternatives for graphic design, animation, video, and audio editing.

name: Photoshop Essentials
description: Learn to use Adobe Photoshop for photo enhancement, typography, and graphic design in this beginner-friendly course.

name: Vladimir Nabokov Book Club with Arya
description: The group begins a chronological journey through Vladimir Nabokov's work, starting with his first novel, "Mary." The discussion will examine the author's precise prose and emotional depth.

name: InspiredWordNYC Presents: Open Mic – Music / Poetry / Comedy
description: A long-running weekly open mic showcase featuring music, poetry, and comedy talent from across the city.

name: Monday Night Bingo
description: A rowdy weekly bingo competition where participants can win bar tabs and prizes. Every drink order includes a ticket for a free personal pizza cooked in the wood-fired oven.

name: Bored of Dating Apps Singles Night
description: A popular offline social event for singles to connect over books, wine, and coffee without dating apps. The evening features early and late sessions for socializing in a relaxed bookshop atmosphere.
short_name: Bored of Dating Apps Singles Night

name: Public Hearing

name: House of SpeakEasy: Seriously Entertaining
description: A literary cabaret series bringing together writers for a fast-paced night of original storytelling connected by unique monthly themes.

name: Trivia Night
description: Test your knowledge across multiple rounds of general trivia to win prizes and glory. Like all events here, your drink purchase comes with a complimentary personal pizza.

name: Tuesday Night Jazz with Danny Jonokuchi

name: Angelika Members Half-Price Tuesday

name: Evil Trivia

name: Reading for the Craft Book Club
description: This meeting features a discussion of Souvankham Thammavongsa’s novel "Pick a Color," focused on storytelling craft. Participants will analyze perspective choices, plot beats, and sentence-level sonics.
short_name: Reading for the Craft Book Club

name: Legendary Locals Featuring the Bmk House Band – Open Mic
description: Every Wednesday, join the BMK house band on stage to perform your favorite songs in a professional live venue setting.
short_name: Legendary Locals Featuring the Bmk House Band – Open Mic

This online course covers the basics of the After Effects interface, text and layer animation, chroma-keying, video effects, keyframing, compositing, and outputting to Premiere.

name: Tití me preguntó
description: A comedy show that serves as a Spanish language preparation and celebration for the halftime show.

description: A recurring virtual reading group focused on the foundations of the healthcare system and the fight for a socialist alternative. Participants will discuss a structured syllabus over four weekly sessions.

short_name: ONLINE | Parsons Summer Intensive Studies 2026 | Pre-College Webinar

name: Thursday Dinner After Dark

name: Songs N Scenes

name: Karaoke Night

name: Flamenco Jazz Jam
description: A fusion of raw Flamenco power and the soul of Jazz featuring spontaneous magic and deep grooves.

name: New York University Men’s Basketball at Emory University
description: The NYU men's basketball team plays an away game at Emory University.

name: Self-Defense & Awareness
description: Classes focused on personal safety, self-defense techniques, and situational awareness.

name: InspiredWordNYC Presents – 1st and 3rd Sundays Open Mic – Music / Poetry / Comedy

name: Weekly Live: NY Blues Rocket and Jam - No Cover

description: The "Book is Better" Book Club meets to compare Jane Austen's classic novel with its cinematic film adaptations.

name: WEBINAR — How to Supercharge Your Executive Presence

name: Supermarket Parking Lot, Charm Bracelet, Mary Malu, J.F. Rites

name: CB6 Full Board Meeting
description: Brooklyn’s Community Board 6 holds their monthly Full Board meeting at Van Alen Institute. Open to the public.

name: Pitchback Playback: ROSALÍA "LUX" [Early Session—UPSTAIRS]
description: An immersive, lights-out listening session of Rosalía's "LUX" on a high-fidelity sound system.

name: Pitchback Playback: ROSALÍA "LUX" [Late Session—UPSTAIRS]
description: A late night immersive listening session of Rosalía's "LUX" experienced in total darkness on a premier sound system.

name: Virtual Financial Aid Workshop
description: This virtual workshop provides information on the FAFSA, scholarship opportunities, and how financial aid eligibility is determined. Learn how to maximize funding for your higher education journey.

name: HEA Romance Book Club: "Dreaming of You" by Lisa Kleypas
description: Join an informal discussion led by Lissa Bak about Lisa Kleypas's romantic classic 'Dreaming of You.' Enjoy a signature cocktail while chatting about Sara Fielding and the dangerous Derek Craven.

short_name: Build your own touch sensitive distortion amplifier!

description: A panel discussion exploring contemporary art and community activism within the Australian Desert's Indigenous art movement.

name: Phoebe Robinson: New Stuff.
description: Comedian and author Phoebe Robinson tests out new material in this intimate stand-up residency.

name: Kendall Thomas: My Funny Valentine – A Miles Davis Songbook

name: Olympics Watch Party: Open For Bowling!
description: Watch the world's best athletes compete on the big screens while you enjoy a game of bowling. It is the perfect atmosphere to cheer for your home team with friends.
short_name: Olympics Watch Party: Open For Bowling!

description: Folk-leaning singer-songwriter Stella Prince performs with Susie McCollum and Amelie Lucille.

name: kylekelly
description: A late-night performance by kylekelly featuring phendste.

short_name: Land Use, Zoning, Public & Private Housing Committee Meeting

description: Review of liquor license applications and renewals for establishments in Tribeca, Fidi, and the Seaport. The committee also discusses outdoor seating regulations under the Dining Out NYC program.

name: Hard Flash
description: An intense club night focused on hard-hitting electronic genres and high-BPM dance music. Attendees should prepare for an immersive experience with driving beats and neon-soaked energy.

name: Book Club: Ballroom: A History, a Movement, a Celebration
description: A deep dive into the history and cultural significance of the ballroom community. This discussion focuses on the origins of the movement and its role in celebratory resistance.
short_name: Ballroom: A History, a Movement, a Celebration

name: Artist Panel | Papunya Tula Artists: Contemporary Art and Community Activism in the Australian Desert
description: A panel discussion exploring the powerful intersection of Indigenous Australian art and social activism. Experts and artists discuss how the Papunya Tula movement shapes contemporary desert art.
short_name: Contemporary Art and Community Activism in the Australian Desert

name: Cure

name: Alumni Cooking Class
